name: jp-menswear-workflow
description: Japanese menswear six-step workflow with orchestrator and reusable skills.

interface.shortDescription: v0.1.2 - Trends, validation, SKU selection, sourcing, same-style confirmation, and direct-to-publish material packs.
interface.longDescription: Version 0.1.2 of the Japanese menswear workflow plugin. Includes six connected skills for trend analysis, multi-source validation, SKU selection, supplier sourcing, same-style confirmation, and final material-pack delivery, with Step 6 direct-link mode and stricter output structure.
defaultPrompt: Run the full Japanese menswear six-step workflow
Continue the current Japanese menswear project from the correct step
Step 6 only: build a direct-to-publish material pack from a product link and skip Steps 1-5 unless I explicitly ask for them
